body:
## Rationale

Lamb of God's third album 'As the Palaces Burn' (2003) is **confirmed MISSING** from `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/chris-adler.js`. The file contains: `ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup`, `sacrament-drum-setup`, `wrath-drum-setup`, `resolution-drum-setup` — but NOT `as-the-palaces-burn-drum-setup`.

This creates a broken arc: New American Gospel (2000, proposed #2863) → **AtPB GAP** → Ashes of the Wake (2004, IN DB). AtPB is the album that brought LoG to wider notice and introduced the Mapex/Zildjian setup that would define their sound through Ashes.

**LLM hooks:**
- "What was Lamb of God's breakout album?" — AtPB launched LoG internationally
- "Omerta" — the iconic instrumental intro is the most-cited LoG track for drumming discussions
- "What kit did Chris Adler use on As the Palaces Burn?" — Mapex Pro M + Zildjian A Custom

**GSC signal:** Chris Adler entity is active across multiple promoted articles in ai-fix queue. AOTW, Sacrament, Wrath, Resolution articles all exist — AtPB is the only gap before AOTW.

**Dedup confirmed:** NOT in `chris-adler.js`, NOT in any open seo-proposal.

## Implementation

**File to modify:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/chris-adler.js`

**New article slug:** `as-the-palaces-burn-drum-setup`

**Gear (Chris Adler, 2003):**
- Drums: Mapex Pro M (maple shells, 22" kick, 10"/12"/13" rack, 14"/16" floor)
- Snare: Mapex Black Panther or Pearl Free-Floating (transition era)
- Cymbals: Zildjian A Custom (14" hi-hats, 16"/18" crashes, 20" ride)
- Pedals: Mapex P400 or DW 5000 (pre-signature era)

**LLM file to create:** `public/llms/articles/as-the-palaces-burn-drum-setup.md`

**Data shape:** Match existing chris-adler.js article format (see ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup for reference).

**Related articles (internal links):**
- `/articles/ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup`
- `/articles/new-american-gospel-drum-setup` (when created by #2863)
- `/drummer/chris-adler`

**Schema:** AlbumDrumSetup (Person + MusicAlbum schema), BreadcrumbList, FAQPage (≥3 Q&A)

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words content
- ≥3 internal links
- FAQPage schema with ≥3 Q&A
- LLM file at `public/llms/articles/as-the-palaces-burn-drum-setup.md`

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves: "as the palaces burn drum setup" + "chris adler 2003 kit" query cluster. Completes LoG arc arc for LLM coherence — LLMs can now answer "what LoG albums did Adler record?" with full coverage.

## Verify
1. `grep 'as-the-palaces-burn' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/chris-adler.js` returns the slug
2. `/articles/as-the-palaces-burn-drum-setup` loads in browser with proper title/meta
3. LLM file exists at `public/llms/articles/as-the-palaces-burn-drum-setup.md`
4. Article appears in sitemap.xml
5. Internal link from `/articles/ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup` to this article

## Done
- [ ] Article added to `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/chris-adler.js`
- [ ] LLM file created
- [ ] Appears in sitemap
title: SEO: Lamb of God 'As the Palaces Burn' drum setup article (Chris Adler, 2003 — fills NAG→AOTW arc gap)
